message:
The other day, I was whipping up dinner when I noticed a little smoke wafting from the pan. No biggie, right? Well, in my usual style of multitasking, I decided to text the family group chat to share the moment. I sent a quick pic of the smoke with the caption, "Dinner’s going great! Anyone want to order pizza?" 

Before I knew it, my phone was buzzing with replies: “Is that a fire?” and “Do we need to evacuate?” I couldn't help but chuckle at the overreactions! But it did remind me how important it is to have a plan in case of a real emergency. 

That little moment sparked a fun but essential conversation about fire safety and escape routes. We even decided to revisit our emergency plans as a family! 

Sometimes, it takes a bit of smoke to remind us to stay prepared. Have you ever had a lighthearted moment turn into a safety lesson with your family?
